title: Appellate Tribunal for Forfeited Property (Conditions of Service of Chairman and Members) Amendment Rules, 1985
description: Appellate Tribunal for Forfeited Property (Conditions of Service of Chairman and Members) Amendment Rules, 1985
text: REGISTERED No. D. (D.N.)-72 The Gazette of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (i) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 571} NEW DELHI, TUESDAY, DECEMBER 31, 1985/PAUSA 9, 1907 Separate Paging is given to this Part in order that it may be filed as a separate compilation MINISTRY OF FINANCE (Depai (merit of Revenue) New Delhi, the 31st December, 1985 NOTIFICATION G.S.R. 953(E)—In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 26 of the Smugglers and Foreign Exchange Mani- pulators (Forfeiture of Property) Act, 1976 (13 of 1976), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Appellate Tribunal for Forfeited (1) 1333 GI/85 -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] Property (Conditions of service of Chairman and Members) Stales, 1978, namely^— 1. (!) These rules may be called the Appellate Tribunal for Forfeited Property (Conditions of service of Chairman and Members) Amendment Rules. 1985. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2, In the Appellate Tribunal for Forfeited Properly (©Additions of service of Chairman iind Members) Rutes. 1978, after clause (b) of sub-rule (1) of rule 11, the following clause shall be inserted, namely :— "(c) Notwithsiandiiij; anything contained in clause (b). where a person appointed as Chairman is due to retire on attaining the age of superannuation under the relevant mlei apni c;«hle to him within a period of one year utter completion of the period of three years referred to in that clause, such parson shall continue to hold office as Chairman till the date of his superannuation under the said rules."
